notes: M31 (Agentic Loop — read-side) COMPLETE. All 11 tasks shipped, 8/8 E2E green, 958/958 unit tests passing.
M32 plan doc not yet written. Write it when M32 work begins — use docs/plans/2026-04-14-team-x-phase-5-m31-agentic-loop.md as the structural template.

M32 scope (from Phase 5 design §4 + §7): write-side Task Planner tools — decompose_project, delegate_subtask, review_deliverable. Swaps M31's read-only tool registry for the write set on the same AgenticLoopService harness. New event types: plan.*, task.*, review.*.

Two M31 follow-ups land best at M32 T0 or T1 (both renderer-only, small): F1 = useAgentStepStream backfill on mount (~20 LOC), F2 = useThreadList bus invalidator (~2 LOC). Full detail in docs/plans/2026-04-13-team-x-phase-5-intelligence-layer.md §14.

M31 patterns to carry into M32: three-tier canned test seam (classifier/provider/tools), {rows, truncated} envelope for agentic tools, data-step-kind as stable E2E selector, pause-aware providerRouter.complete wrapper, AbortController-driven stop with canceled-status coercion, per-task Loki ledger commits (chore(loki): M<N> T<N> — commit ledger (<sha>)).

ABI rebuild dance is mandatory before every T10-style verification run. Node ABI via `cd node_modules/.pnpm/better-sqlite3@11.10.0/node_modules/better-sqlite3 && npx node-gyp rebuild --release` (pnpm rebuild silently no-ops when the prebuild dir is missing), Electron ABI via `pnpm -F @team-x/desktop exec electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3,keytar`. Document this in the M32 plan T10 acceptance criteria.
